experiment: F-STR3 COMMIT reservation: mandatory allocation for danger-zone domains
method: Implementation + observational verification. Build 1-in-5 mandatory COMMIT reservation in dispatch_optimizer.py. Verify mechanism fires correctly in simulation. Track prospectively whether it changes dispatch behavior.

H1_mechanism_fires.prediction: Reservation fires when 0 of last 5 closed lanes are danger-zone domains
H1_mechanism_fires.threshold: fires correctly in simulated edge case (all non-danger recent lanes)
H1_mechanism_fires.result: CONFIRMED — fires when simulated recent=[meta, strategy, nk, expert-swarm, meta]

H2_no_false_positive.prediction: Reservation does NOT fire when a danger-zone domain IS in recent lanes
H2_no_false_positive.threshold: does not fire when social-media (danger) is in recent 5
H2_no_false_positive.result: CONFIRMED — social-media in recent lanes prevents firing. has_recent_commit=True

H3_prospective_behavior.prediction: When reservation fires in future sessions, ≥50% follow-through (vs 0% advisory-only L-815)
H3_prospective_behavior.result: PENDING — reservation has not yet fired in real dispatch (social-media in recent 5)

implementation.function: _get_recent_lane_domains(n) — returns last N closed lane domains
implementation.check: if 0 danger-zone domains in recent N → flag top-scoring danger domain as commit_reservation=True
implementation.output: COMMIT RESERVATION header with MANDATORY directive + 🚨RESERVED tag on domain

current_state.reason: social-media (DOMEX-SOC-S396) is in recent 5 and is danger-phase

data.L815_context: Advisory scoring (guarantee boost to rank #3) produced 0/2 follow-through. P-264: score-behavior decoupling. L-601: structural enforcement beats voluntary.
escalation_layers: Layer 1 (S389): danger boost +1.5 — insufficient for cold domains
Layer 2 (S395): COMMIT floor (median) — insufficient for zero-exploit
Layer 3 (S396): guarantee boost to rank #3 — insufficient for exploitation pressure

findings: COMMIT reservation mechanism implemented and verified (H1 CONFIRMED, H2 CONFIRMED)
19 danger-zone frontiers across 12 domains at 2-wave valley of death
Current state: reservation does NOT fire because social-media was dispatched in S396 (within window)
4-layer escalation complete: advisory → floor → guarantee → reservation (each layer failed before next was needed)
Prospective test H3 PENDING: track whether reservation firing changes behavior vs advisory 0% baseline
prescription: Monitor next 10 sessions. When reservation fires, track whether the dispatching node follows the MANDATORY directive. If follow-through <50%, consider hard override (reservation domain as sole output).
